nasb.text: Now accept the one who is weak in faith, but not for the purpose of passing judgment on his opinions.

esv.text: As for the one who is weak in faith, welcome him, but not to quarrel over opinions.

cnv.text: 你們要接納信心軟弱的人，不要論斷引起爭論的事。

ccb.text: 你们要接纳信心软弱的弟兄姊妹，不要因为看法不同便彼此批评。

csbs.text: 你们要接纳在信仰上软弱的人，避免在有争议的事上辩论。
